title: gentiana aspera subsp. norica
intro: Gentiana aspera subsp. norica, also known as Norican Gentian, is a subspecies of the Gentiana aspera plant, a type of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and stomach ulcers, due to its bitter compounds that stimulate digestive enzymes. The health benefits of Gentiana aspera subsp. norica include its ability to improve appetite, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, and can be used to support the digestive system and promote overall well-being.
